rationale: Each entry was flagged by 3+ independent Korean 자소서 guides as 진부 / 추상적 / 클리셰. Cross-source HR survey statistics: 성실한 (49.2%), 노력하는 (36.3%), 책임감 있는 (28.5%), 솔선수범하는 (21.8%), 창의적인 (21.8%), 도전적인 (13.4%) per published 인사담당자 surveys. Sources: 워크넷, 잡코리아, 사람인, 링커리어, 캐치, 하이잡, brunch career writers, plus the khan.co.kr / hankookilbo HR-survey citations. See research-notes.md.
policy: Each occurrence reduces the 표현 dimension by 1 (floor 0). The reviewer turn surfaces the offending sentence in banned_phrase_hits using pipe-separated format: '성실한|... 성실한 자세로 임했습니다 ...'. Multiple distinct phrases compound; multiple instances of the same phrase count once.
